initiatives.name: Chehalis River Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Our goal is to create mutual aid projects that meet the needs of the communities and identify affiliate groups in need of amplification, assistance, or support.

initiatives.name: The Blackflower Collective
initiatives.description: We are a collectively owned land and housing co-op in so called Grays Harbor County WA

initiatives.name: Aberdeen IWW
initiatives.description: Join the movement, and be part of the fight for better working conditions, better pay, and a world without capitalism.
